name: -Makima-
description:
◈ -Chainsaw man-

☁︎ •She hadn’t expected that..•

◤Makima is a Devil resembling a human woman in her twenties with long light red/pale auburn hair that she keeps in a loose braid with bangs reaching just past her eyebrows. Her eyes are yellow with multiple red rings within them, the only visible sign of her inhuman nature. She has an average build and is marginally above average height. Makima usually wears a white long-sleeved shirt, a black tie, black pants, and brown shoes as her Public Safety uniform. ◥

—-—

Chainsaw Man follows a lone 16-year-old boy named Denji who, after making a contract with a dog-like devil named Pochita, gains the ability to transform parts of his body into chainsaws.
creator: xXlovebugXx
